summary: Iteration 63: Bone Graft and Approval Comments Features - 10/10 tests PASSED (100%). Verified both new features: (1) Bone graft toggle with details in Phase 2, (2) Supervisor/InCharge approval comments for Phase 2-4 (NOT Phase 1). All data correctly saved and PDF export includes bone graft and notes.
critical_code_review_comments: Bone graft feature verified: bone_graft_used=true saves with bone_graft_details in phase2_data
Bone graft feature verified: bone_graft_used=false saves correctly without details
Phase 1 approval without comment works (backward compatible, no regression)
Phase 2 approval with comment saves phase2_supervisor_notes and phase2_incharge_notes
Phase 2 approval without comment works (comment is optional)
Phase 3 approval with comment saves phase3_supervisor_notes and phase3_incharge_notes
Phase 4 Step 1 approval with comment saves phase4_step1_supervisor_notes and phase4_step1_incharge_notes
Phase 4 Step 2 approval with comment saves phase4_step2_supervisor_notes and phase4_step2_incharge_notes
PDF export generates successfully with bone graft data and all approval notes
seed_data_creation: Test procedures created with TEST_ prefix during testing
context_for_next_testing_agent: Both new features verified: (1) Bone graft in Phase 2 - bone_graft_used (bool) and bone_graft_details (str) saved in phase2_data, (2) Approval comments for Phase 2-4 saved as phase{N}_supervisor_notes and phase{N}_incharge_notes. Phase 1 approval does NOT save comments (by design). Comment field on ApprovalAction is optional - approvals work with or without comments. PDF export includes bone graft data and all approval notes.

tested_features.phase1_approval_without_comment_no_regre: PASS - Phase 1 approval works without comment field
tested_features.phase2_submit_with_bone_graft_true: PASS - bone_graft_used=true and bone_graft_details saved in phase2_data
tested_features.phase4_step2_approval_with_comments: PASS - phase4_step2_supervisor_notes and phase4_step2_incharge_notes saved, status=completed
tested_features.pdf_export_includes_bone_graft_and_notes: PASS - PDF generated with bone graft data and all approval notes

tested_endpoints.POST /api/procedures/{id}/submit-phase2: 200 - Saves bone_graft_used and bone_graft_details in phase2_data
tested_endpoints.POST /api/procedures/{id}/case-report: 200 - Generates PDF with bone graft data and approval notes
